name: kununu/collections
description: To reduce boilerplate associated with collections

scripts.test-coverage: XDEBUG_MODE=coverage phpunit --testsuite Full --testdox --testdox-summary --log-junit tests/.results/tests-junit.xml --coverage-clover tests/.results/tests-clover.xml --coverage-html tests/.results/html/

scripts-descriptions.cs: Run PHP CS Fixer with kununu code standards
scripts-descriptions.rector: Run Rector in dry-run mode with CI rules
scripts-descriptions.rector-fix: Run Rector in fix mode with CI rules
scripts-descriptions.test-coverage: Run all tests with coverage report
